instructions.instruction: Run skill-quality-auditor (evaluate.sh --json --store) before publishing and verify A-grade minimum (≥108/120); block publication if below threshold
instructions.original_snippets: Quality Gate: Skill MUST score ≥108/120 (A-grade) to proceed...Run quality audit and store results: sh skills/agentic-harness/skill-quality-auditor/scripts/evaluate.sh <domain>/<skill-name> --json --store
instructions.relevant_when: preparing a skill for public publication

instructions.instruction: NEVER publish below A-grade (108/120) — audit, remediate, and re-audit until threshold is met
instructions.original_snippets: NEVER publish below A-grade (108/120) — audit, remediate, and re-audit until threshold is met
instructions.relevant_when: any time a skill's score is below the threshold

instructions.instruction: Ensure 5-8 evaluation scenarios exist in the evals/ directory, each with user prompt, expected behavior, success criteria, and failure conditions
instructions.original_snippets: Eval scenarios are NOT optional: Public skills require evaluation scenarios to prove effectiveness...Aim for 5-8 scenarios covering: Basic publication readiness check...edge cases
instructions.relevant_when: preparing a tile for public publication

instructions.instruction: tile.json private field must be boolean false (not string 'false', not true, not omitted) for public publishing
instructions.original_snippets: private: false - Must be boolean (not string 'false')...NEVER omit private: false — tile.json defaults to private: true
instructions.relevant_when: creating or editing tile.json for public publishing

instructions.instruction: tile.json name must follow workspace/tile-name format with lowercase, kebab-case only (no spaces, underscores, or uppercase)
instructions.original_snippets: name - Format: workspace/tile-name (lowercase, kebab-case)...Workspace and tile-name must use lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens only

instructions.instruction: tile.json version must use x.y.z semantic format with no 'v' prefix; bump version when republishing
instructions.original_snippets: version - Semantic: x.y.z (no v prefix)...When republishing, version must be higher than previous published version
instructions.relevant_when: setting or updating the version field in tile.json

instructions.instruction: tile.json summary must embed keywords inline with 'Keywords: term1, term2' — NOT a separate keywords array; include 'Use when...' trigger phrase
instructions.original_snippets: summary - 150-300 chars, embed keywords inline (NOT separate array)...IMPORTANT: Embed keywords inline with 'Keywords: term1, term2, term3' rather than separate keywords array
instructions.relevant_when: writing or editing the summary field in tile.json

instructions.instruction: tile.json skills object must be non-empty with at least one skill, each having a valid path pointing to an existing SKILL.md with frontmatter
instructions.original_snippets: skills - Non-empty, paths exist, SKILL.md has frontmatter...At least one skill must be defined...Skill identifier must be kebab-case
instructions.relevant_when: creating the skills section of tile.json

instructions.instruction: Run tessl skill review --optimize if score < 90% — optimization can boost scores from 85% to 99%
instructions.original_snippets: NEVER skip --optimize when below 90% — optimization can boost scores from 85% → 99%...tessl skill review skills/<domain>/<skill-name> --optimize
instructions.relevant_when: reviewing a skill's Tessl quality score

instructions.instruction: Validate agent-agnostic compliance: scan SKILL.md for harness-specific tools (claude-code, cursor, vs-code, opencode-specific) and replace with universal tools (Read, Write, Edit, Bash, Grep, Glob)
instructions.original_snippets: NEVER use agent-specific tools — public skills must use universal tools only (Bash, Edit, Read, Write, Grep, Glob)...grep -i 'claude code|cursor|vs code|opencode' skills/domain/skill-name/SKILL.md
instructions.relevant_when: validating a skill for cross-agent compatibility before publishing

instructions.instruction: Published versions are immutable — republishing an existing public skill requires a version increment
instructions.original_snippets: Version bumping required: Republishing existing skill requires version increment...Published versions are immutable
